data.title: Total votes in AB SKF changed due to share conversion, with 455,351,068 shares as of Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden on January 30, 2026, AB SKF has undergone a share conversion from Series A to Series B as outlined in the company's Articles of Association. Currently, there are 455,351,068 shares in AB SKF as of the mentioned date.

data.title: Nomination Committee proposes Karen Florschütz and Maximiliane Straub as new AB SKF board members. Florschütz is from Airbus.
data.description: In an announcement made on January 30, 2026, in Gothenburg, Sweden, SKF's Nomination Committee has put forth a proposal for the election of Karen Florschütz and Maximiliane Straub as new members of the AB SKF Board. Karen Florschütz, currently holding the position of Top Group Executive at Airbus, has a background as the Executive Vice President Connected. The recommendation highlights their potential roles in the company's leadership.

data.title: Dreame unveils L9 AI Washer & Dryer and AI Laundry Robot in Silicon Valley, latest innovations showcased.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 30, 2026, in San Jose, California, Dreame Robot Laundry presented its newest products at a worldwide debut in Silicon Valley. The showcased items included the L9 AI Washer & Dryer Set along with the pioneering Embodied AI Laundry Robot. These innovative creations were introduced by the Shuzhi Society and have been developed to revolutionize the laundry industry.

data.title: SKF Q4 2025: Net sales MSEK 21,969, 0.0% Organic growth. Operating profit MSEK 2,588.Industrial growth offset by Automotive decline.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, as of January 30, 2026, the net sales for Q4 of 2025 amounted to MSEK 21,969, showing a decrease compared to the previous period's MSEK 24,725. The organic growth was recorded at 0.0%, a slight improvement from the previous -3.1%. This growth was primarily fueled by an increase in organic sales within the Industrial sector. However, this growth was offset by a decline in market demand for the Automotive sector. The adjusted operating profit for this period was MSEK 2,588.

data.title: Peter Schiff questions how Strategy Inc. can sustain 11% dividend payout on its preferred stock; Michael Saylor defends STRC's yield with less volatility.
data.description: Economist Peter Schiff has raised concerns about Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) maintaining an 11% dividend payout on its Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock (NASDAQ: STRC) given the company's ongoing financial difficulties. Strategy founder Michael Saylor defended STRC by highlighting its 11% annual dividend, paid monthly in cash, backed by Bitcoin. Saylor emphasized STRC's low historical volatility of 6%, compared to Strategy's Class A shares and the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (NASDAQ: IBIT). Schiff questioned the sustainability of the 11% yield, pointing out that MSTR is operating at a loss, and paying the dividend would only exacerbate the losses.

data.title: World Gym Corporation plans public listing in U.S., introduces new biomarker tech. 280+ locations globally.
data.description: The management of World Gym Corporation, the owner of the renowned World Gym brand with more than 280 locations globally, is considering a public listing in the U.S. The company, listed as 2762.TW, also announced the introduction of new biomarker technology integration. This move was highlighted in Taipei on Jan. 30, 2026.

data.title: Tetragon Financial Group December 2025 factsheet released: NAV $3,892m, NAV per Share $41.88, Share Price $17.35, Monthly Return on Equity 0.5%.
data.description: In London on January 30, 2026, Tetragon issued its December 2025 Monthly Factsheet. The Net Asset Value stands at $3,892 million with a Fully Diluted NAV per Share of $41.88. Additionally, the Share Price (TFG NA) is reported at $17.35. The Monthly NAV per Share Total Return experienced a minor growth of 0.1% while the Monthly Return on Equity reached 0.5%. This update follows the latest Quarterly report from the company.

data.title: AKVA group ASA is inviting to presentation of Q4 2025 financial results.
data.description: Join us for the unveiling of AKVA group ASA's financial performance in the fourth quarter of 2025. This presentation will showcase our results and financial figures for the period.

data.title: Circle aims to boost institutional stablecoin adoption by focusing on durable infrastructure, with plans to scale by 2026.
data.description: In a recent report, Circle has highlighted its plan to prioritize scaling its payments network and institution-focused blockchain by the year 2026. This decision comes as numerous companies are exploring the potential applications of stablecoins. Circle aims to expand and enhance its offerings in these areas in the coming years to meet the growing demand for digital payment solutions. The company's strategy reflects a long-term commitment to innovation and development in the digital asset sector, signaling its readiness to adapt to the evolving needs of the market.

data.title: Q3 update: Oct 31, 2025 - the latest figures for the past three months.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that the global economy is poised for a rapid recovery with a projected growth rate of 5.6% in 2021, following a decline of 3.5% in the previous year. This rebound is attributed to various factors such as successful vaccine distribution, stimulus packages, and improving consumer confidence. However, risks remain due to uneven vaccination rates across countries and the emergence of new COVID-19 variants. It is estimated that emerging market and developing economies will grow by 6.3%, while advanced economies are expected to grow by 5.1%. In terms of specific regions, the United States is predicted to grow by 6.4%, China by 8.4%, and the Euro area by 4.4%. It is crucial for policymakers to monitor these developments closely and implement strategies to ensure sustainable and inclusive growth in the post-pandemic era.
